fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Montana Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Montana - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity montana, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to montana, speech-language pathologist compact montana, montana speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech-Language Pathologists and Audiologists
board.parent_dept: Montana Department of Labor and Industry
board.mailing_address: 301 S. Park Ave., P.O. Box 200513, Helena, MT 59620-0513

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Montana.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with fees to the Board.

telepractice_text: Montana permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Montana issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Montana is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Montana SLP license cost?
Is Montana part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Montana allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Montana have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Montana participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Montana without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Montana?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Montana while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Montana is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
